final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic still of an astronaut floating in Earth orbit with a space station at the frame edge.

Style/medium: photorealistic sci-fi cinematic still, NASA documentary meets Interstellar aesthetic
Composition: medium shot of astronaut centered, partial space station structure at left or right edge, Earth curvature visible below, deep space above, 24mm wide-angle lens
Subject: astronaut in detailed modern EVA suit with reflective visor, life support backpack, tether cable, floating in zero gravity
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit, planet Earth occupying lower third with visible continents and atmosphere glow, vibrant Milky Way and colorful nebula in deep background, scattered stars
Lighting/mood: soft blue-white Earthshine illuminating the astronaut from below, subtle rim light from sun just out of frame, dramatic contrast between lit suit and dark space void
Color palette: deep space black as base, warm Earth blues and greens as anchor, magenta and cyan nebula hues as accent, silver-white suit highlights
Materials/textures: matte white fabric suit with metallic joints, scratched gold visor reflection, carbon fiber details, vacuum-smooth metal station panels
Avoid: cartoon rendering, lens flare abuse, oversaturated colors, deformed proportions, 8K stuffer text
